title: Job Vacancies at Reposebay Human Resource Limited
content:
Reposebay is a boutique recruitment company serving both micro employers and SMEs with customized solutions and human capital growth strategies. Her career advisory specialty services have impacted over 3000+ job seekers.



We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:



1.) Laundry Attendant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Laundry Attendant is the face of our facility, responsible for maintaining a clean, safe, and welcoming environment. This role balances high-quality customer service with technical oversight of our machinery and the precise execution of professional laundry services.


Key Responsibilities


	Customer Excellence: Greet every customer with a friendly demeanor and provide proactive assistance with machine selection, payment systems, and general inquiries.
	Facility Stewardship: Maintain a pristine environment by performing regular cleaning cycles, including sweeping, mopping, sanitizing high-touch surfaces, cleaning restrooms, and timely trash removal.
	Operational Monitoring: Continuously monitor the performance of washers and dryers to ensure all units operate at peak efficiency and are used correctly by patrons.
	Technical Troubleshooting: Identify equipment malfunctions and perform minor troubleshooting; promptly report complex mechanical issues to management to minimize downtime.
	Wash-Dry-Fold Services: Execute professional "drop-off" services with close attention to detail, ensuring all laundry is washed according to garment care labels and folded to company standards.
	Safety & Compliance: Enforce all facility safety rules and operational policies to protect both customers and equipment, ensuring a secure environment for all.
	Supplies Management: Monitor and replenish vending machines or soap stations, ensuring customers have access to the laundry products they need.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Service Mindset: Ability to handle customer needs with patience and a positive attitude.
	Attention to Detail: Precision in folding and a keen eye for cleanliness.
	Physical Stamina: Ability to stand for long periods and lift laundry bags (up to 20kg).
	Problem-Solving: Basic mechanical aptitude for troubleshooting appliance issues.
	Proximity: Proximity to Lekki Phase 1 is a key requirement for this position. Candidates residing within Lekki Phase 1 or the immediate surrounding areas (e.g., Ikate, Victoria Island, Oniru) will be given strong preference to ensure punctuality and ease of commute.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month. 

Application Closing Date: 10th May, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Premium Lounge Waitress (Beverage Specialist)

Job Location: CMD, Magodo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a sophisticated, well-groomed, and highly knowledgeable Waitress to join our team.
	This role is for a hospitality professional who does more than just deliver drinks; you are a beverage expert and a key part of our lounge's atmosphere.
	You must possess a deep understanding of spirits and wines, communicate with elegance, and have the confidence to manage your floor independently.


Key Responsibilities


	Beverage Consultation: Act as an expert guide for guests, offering sophisticated recommendations on premium spirits (Cognac, Single Malts), wines, and signature cocktails.
	Independent Floor Management: Take full ownership of your station. You are expected to work proactively without constant supervision, ensuring guest needs are met before they ask.
	Elite Guest Engagement: Communicate clearly and professionally with high-profile clientele, maintaining a friendly yet respectful demeanor at all times.
	The "Club" Pace: Efficiently manage high-volume "bottle service" and fast-paced orders while maintaining perfect table etiquette.
	Strategic Upselling: Use your product knowledge to suggest premium upgrades and pairings, directly impacting the guest experience and venue revenue.
	Seamless Execution: Handle everything from precise order entry to quick, accurate payment processing (POS/Cash) with zero errors.


Requirements


	Alcoholic Beverage Mastery: You must have a strong working knowledge of alcohol brands, flavor profiles, and serving temperatures.
	Proven Experience: Prior experience in a high-end lounge or nightclub is highly preferred. We value candidates who understand the fast-paced "nightlife" environment.
	Exceptional Communication: Sound, polished verbal skills are essential for interacting with our diverse guest list.
	Self-Sufficient: A "can-do" attitude with the ability to multitask and solve problems on the fly without waiting for instructions.
	Professional Grooming: A high standard of personal presentation and poise is required.
	Proximity: Must reside in or around Ikeja, Ikosi, Ketu, or Magodo.


Application Closing Date: 6th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	Only qualified candidates will be contacted.
	Ensure your CV is updated.


 

3.) Lead Barman / Mixologist

Job Location: CMD, Magodo - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, highly skilled, and autonomous Barman/Mixologist to lead our beverage program.
	The ideal candidate is a master of classic cocktails, a creator of signature blends, and an expert in premium spirits.
	You should be a "pro" who can command a bar, manage inventory with integrity, and work flawlessly under pressure without needing a supervisor to watch your every move.


Key Responsibilities


	Mixology & Craft: Prepare and serve a wide range of cocktails and beverages with precision, speed, and flair.
	Beverage Consultancy: Educate both guests and waitstaff on spirit profiles, wine pairings, and new additions to the bar menu.
	Inventory & Quality Control: Manage bar stock, monitor expiration dates, and ensure "zero waste" practices. You are responsible for the bar’s profitability.
	Independent Operation: From opening the bar to closing the books, you must be capable of running the entire bar operation independently.
	Cleanliness & Organization: Maintain a pristine, organized, and hygienic bar environment at all times—your workspace is the center of the lounge.
	Customer Interaction: Engage with guests at the bar with sound communication, building rapport, and a loyal customer base.


Requirements


	Expert Mixology Skills: Deep knowledge of classic cocktails, contemporary mixology techniques, and garnish art.
	Spirit Expertise: Advanced knowledge of alcoholic beverages, including the ability to distinguish between different grades of whiskey, cognac, and gin.
	Nightlife Experience: Previous experience in a high-volume club or luxury lounge is essential. You must be able to handle "rush hour" without losing your cool.
	Integrity & Trust: Must be honest and reliable in handling stock and cash/POS transactions.
	Communication: Strong, professional verbal skills to interact with high-end clientele.
	Location: Must reside within or near Ikeja,Ikosi, Ketu, or Magodo.


Application Closing Date: 6th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note


	Only qualified candidates will be contacted.


 

    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female ISO Document Controller / Personal Assistant",
  "description": "Sevan Construction Nigeria Limited was established in 1981 with Registration No. RC 37125 as a limited liability company specialized in all kinds of &ldquo;PEB&rdquo;: Pre-Engineered Buildings. Located in Lagos, Nigeria. SEVAN combines its international know-how to its local connections to contribute more to Nigeria&rsquo;s development. Our Success has been built on customer satisfaction and loyalty which is based on our performance in the execution of contracts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female ISO Document Controller / Personal Assistant
Job Location:&nbsp;Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Sustenance of the Integrated Management System in the company by ensuring that all QMS processes are established, implemented, and maintained.
	Assists in the ISO 9001,14001 &amp; 45001 certification maintenance program.
	Managing Clients contracts, relationships and annually reviewing current company client base by keeping proper client details &amp; profiles, reconciliations, retention records.
	Coordinating and managing internal and external ISO audits.
	Developing and maintaining ISO documentation and procedures.
	Conducting employee ISO training and quality audits.
	Reporting and recommending corrective actions for any ISO issues.
	Identify potential issues with documentation and provide timely solutions (close out where necessary).
	Typing, Binding and proper filling of Documents (Hard &amp; Soft copies).
	Ability to Schedule meetings and manage calendars.
	Answer phone calls and take messages.
	Draft correspondence such as emails and letters.
	Prepare minutes of meetings.
	Following up and provide administrative support on bidding for new projects.
	Managing highly confidential information in accordance with the company policy, processes and procedures.
	Liaising with various departments, such as account, store and technical department to achieve goals on time delivery of projects/materials.
	Prepare certificate of completion on the completed project.


Qualifications


	OND, HND, B.Sc. in Business or Public Administration, Social sciences &amp; Secretariat studies.
	MBA is a plus.


Skills:&nbsp;


	Knowledge of ISO Processes, procedures, practices and documentations will be a major added advantage that will be highly considered.
	A self-starter, capable of acting on own initiative and proactively managing competing demands, pressures and able to multi-task effectively.
	Must be able to work collaboratively, with a range of colleagues in the wider organization, as well as with external stakeholders.
	Excellent interpersonal, diplomatic, oral communication skills.
	Good level of numeracy and ability to analyse statistical and financial data.
	Confidence in working with senior internal and external stakeholders at director and trustee level.
	Well placed sense of judgment and political skills, able to exercise absolute discretion and confidentiality.
	Evidence of an ability to &ldquo;think outside the box&rdquo; and generate and implement creative solutions.
	To be able to work with versatility, meeting unexpected, very tight deadlines on occasion, being able to priorities as required and able to work autonomously.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;hr@sevan-nigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as subject of the email.",

Female ISO Document Controller / Personal Assistant Job at Sevan Construction Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Sevan Construction Nigeria Limited was established in 1981 with Registration No. RC 37125 as a limited liability company specialized in all kinds of “PEB”: Pre-Engineered Buildings. Located in Lagos, Nigeria. SEVAN combines its international know-how to its local connections to contribute more to Nigeria’s development. Our Success has been built on customer satisfaction and loyalty which is based on our performance in the execution of contracts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female ISO Document Controller / Personal Assistant
Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Sustenance of the Integrated Management System in the company by ensuring that all QMS processes are established, implemented, and maintained.
	Assists in the ISO 9001,14001 & 45001 certification maintenance program.
	Managing Clients contracts, relationships and annually reviewing current company client base by keeping proper client details & profiles, reconciliations, retention records.
	Coordinating and managing internal and external ISO audits.
	Developing and maintaining ISO documentation and procedures.
	Conducting employee ISO training and quality audits.
	Reporting and recommending corrective actions for any ISO issues.
	Identify potential issues with documentation and provide timely solutions (close out where necessary).
	Typing, Binding and proper filling of Documents (Hard & Soft copies).
	Ability to Schedule meetings and manage calendars.
	Answer phone calls and take messages.
	Draft correspondence such as emails and letters.
	Prepare minutes of meetings.
	Following up and provide administrative support on bidding for new projects.
	Managing highly confidential information in accordance with the company policy, processes and procedures.
	Liaising with various departments, such as account, store and technical department to achieve goals on time delivery of projects/materials.
	Prepare certificate of completion on the completed project.


Qualifications


	OND, HND, B.Sc. in Business or Public Administration, Social sciences & Secretariat studies.
	MBA is a plus.


Skills: 


	Knowledge of ISO Processes, procedures, practices and documentations will be a major added advantage that will be highly considered.
	A self-starter, capable of acting on own initiative and proactively managing competing demands, pressures and able to multi-task effectively.
	Must be able to work collaboratively, with a range of colleagues in the wider organization, as well as with external stakeholders.
	Excellent interpersonal, diplomatic, oral communication skills.
	Good level of numeracy and ability to analyse statistical and financial data.
	Confidence in working with senior internal and external stakeholders at director and trustee level.
	Well placed sense of judgment and political skills, able to exercise absolute discretion and confidentiality.
	Evidence of an ability to “think outside the box” and generate and implement creative solutions.
	To be able to work with versatility, meeting unexpected, very tight deadlines on occasion, being able to priorities as required and able to work autonomously.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the email.

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Control Officer",
  "description": "Citygate Global Investment Ltd is an organization founded in June 2007 to engage in Finance business (Microfinance Finance) and registered with Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC). Citygate Global is a registered member of Association of Non-Bank Microfinance Institution of Nigeria (AMFIN) and also a registered Money Lending Company in all the States where we operate.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type:

Job Summary


	The Internal Control Officer will play a critical role in monitoring, evaluating, and improving the effectiveness of the Bank&rsquo;s internal control processes.
	The position requires individuals with a strong ethical foundation, excellent analytical skills, and a keen eye for detail


Responsibilities


	Conduct periodic internal control reviews across branches and business units.
	Ensure compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and Sharia-compliant processes.
	Perform spot checks, transaction monitoring, and exception reporting.
	Identify process gaps, control weaknesses, and operational lapses.
	Prepare and present detailed internal control review reports


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/BSc in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or any related discipline.
	Strong understanding of basic audit, accounting, and internal control principles.
	High ethical standards, integrity, and confidentiality.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other MS Office tools.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a structured environment.
	Follow up on remediation plans and escalate unresolved issues.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@citygateglobal.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Internal Control Officer Job at Citygate Global Investment Limited




        
    

        
        Citygate Global Investment Ltd is an organization founded in June 2007 to engage in Finance business (Microfinance Finance) and registered with Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC). Citygate Global is a registered member of Association of Non-Bank Microfinance Institution of Nigeria (AMFIN) and also a registered Money Lending Company in all the States where we operate.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location:  Lagos
Employment Type:

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Internal Control Officer will play a critical role in monitoring, evaluating, and improving the effectiveness of the Bank’s internal control processes.
	The position requires individuals with a strong ethical foundation, excellent analytical skills, and a keen eye for detail


Responsibilities


	Conduct periodic internal control reviews across branches and business units.
	Ensure compliance with internal policies, regulatory requirements, and Sharia-compliant processes.
	Perform spot checks, transaction monitoring, and exception reporting.
	Identify process gaps, control weaknesses, and operational lapses.
	Prepare and present detailed internal control review reports


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/BSc in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or any related discipline.
	Strong understanding of basic audit, accounting, and internal control principles.
	High ethical standards, integrity, and confidentiality.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and other MS Office tools.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a structured environment.
	Follow up on remediation plans and escalate unresolved issues.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Officer",
  "description": "Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation&rsquo;s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home &amp; Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand &amp; Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Benin, Edo
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Category: HR Operations

Job Summary


	Seven-Up Bottling Company is currently recruiting for a Talent Experience Officer whose responsibilities focus on providing strategic and hands-on support for P &amp;C function in respective region in the areas of recruiting, onboarding, employee relations, compliance, compensation and benefit and training.


Responsibilities
Recruitment/Performance management:


	Liaise with the talent resourcing team to organize and coordinate regional recruiting process (create ads, manage on-line postings, schedule
	Organize and implement the on-boardingprocess for new hires (conduct orientation to the Institute, present and explain benefit offerings, and provide employees with a welcoming and inclusive experience)
	Assist in annual budget planning and maintenance of departmental budget.
	Facilitate scheduled performance review process, providing guidance, tools and training for managers and employees.
	Provide HR reports as needed to central administration and scientific leadership


Human Capital:


	Ensuring maintenance of all employee data, records and files in accordance with statutory and organizational requirements.
	Ensuring that files and systems are up to date and accurate at all times
	Appropriate absence monitoring including use of electronic time-keeping systems liaising with managers as required
	Provide compensation related data to support preparation and processing of payroll as required. Ensure timely resolution of compensation related queries


Employee Relations:


	Serve as key communicator and enforcer of key HR policy and procedure including leave of absence, time and attendance management, and the like, to ensure
	Effective implementation of policies and procedures
	Provision of employee relations advice and guidance including current and former employees including advising leadership on organization


Requirements


	A minimum of Bachelor&#39;s Degree (B.Sc.) or HND in Social Sciences, Humanities or any other related field with&nbsp;2-4 years of work experience
	Proven work experience as HR in an FMCG Industry is preferable


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@sevenup.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

HR Officer Job at Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited




        
    

        
        Seven-Up Bottling Company Limited is one of the largest manufacturing companies in Nigeria, producing and distributing some of the nation’s most- loved beverages in the country like; Pepsi, 7Up, Mirinda, Teem, Mountain Dew, H2oH!, Lipton Ice Tea and Aquafina premium drinking water. SBC has recently entered into Home & Personal Care category with the 2SURE brand and launched its first product, a Hand & Surface Sanitizer. Seven Up boasts of nine bottling plants with state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities strategically located across various regions in the country.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Benin, Edo
Employment Type: Full-time
Job Category: HR Operations

Job Summary


	Seven-Up Bottling Company is currently recruiting for a Talent Experience Officer whose responsibilities focus on providing strategic and hands-on support for P &C function in respective region in the areas of recruiting, onboarding, employee relations, compliance, compensation and benefit and training.


Responsibilities
Recruitment/Performance management:


	Liaise with the talent resourcing team to organize and coordinate regional recruiting process (create ads, manage on-line postings, schedule
	Organize and implement the on-boardingprocess for new hires (conduct orientation to the Institute, present and explain benefit offerings, and provide employees with a welcoming and inclusive experience)
	Assist in annual budget planning and maintenance of departmental budget.
	Facilitate scheduled performance review process, providing guidance, tools and training for managers and employees.
	Provide HR reports as needed to central administration and scientific leadership


Human Capital:


	Ensuring maintenance of all employee data, records and files in accordance with statutory and organizational requirements.
	Ensuring that files and systems are up to date and accurate at all times
	Appropriate absence monitoring including use of electronic time-keeping systems liaising with managers as required
	Provide compensation related data to support preparation and processing of payroll as required. Ensure timely resolution of compensation related queries


Employee Relations:


	Serve as key communicator and enforcer of key HR policy and procedure including leave of absence, time and attendance management, and the like, to ensure
	Effective implementation of policies and procedures
	Provision of employee relations advice and guidance including current and former employees including advising leadership on organization


Requirements


	A minimum of Bachelor's Degree (B.Sc.) or HND in Social Sciences, Humanities or any other related field with 2-4 years of work experience
	Proven work experience as HR in an FMCG Industry is preferable


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
